name: Minerals Assurance Scheme
description: A third-party audit program that assesses mineral smelter and refiner management systems and sourcing practices against international due diligence guidance for responsible supply chains of minerals from conflict-affected and high-risk areas.

endorsement.name: Recognition of Minerals Assurance Scheme alignment with international due diligence standards.

trustmark.name: Recognised Minerals Scheme
trustmark.description: Trust mark awarded by the international benchmarking body.

schemeScoringFramework.name: Minerals Assurance Conformance Classification
schemeScoringFramework.description: Overall conformance classification for facilities assessed under the Minerals Assurance Scheme. Conformant facilities have demonstrated responsible sourcing practices; Active facilities are engaged in corrective actions; Non-Conformant facilities do not meet requirements.

score.definition: Conformant — the facility meets all applicable requirements for responsible mineral sourcing and processing.
Active — the facility is engaged in the assessment process or is implementing corrective actions to address identified gaps.
Non-Conformant — the facility does not meet the requirements for responsible mineral sourcing and processing.

geographicScope.name: Worldwide
geographicScope.schemeName: UN M49 Standard Country or Area Codes

industryScope.name: Manufacture of basic precious and other non-ferrous metals
Mining of other non-ferrous metal ores

trustmark.name: Minerals Assurance Scheme Certified
trustmark.description: Trust mark for facilities that have achieved conformant status under the Minerals Assurance Scheme.
